creator: gary@hayers.org
text:
Maybe someone with an @freebsd.org address could contact them and try to 
persuede them?

 > So? Do i close this ticket or do you have a solution ?

 >> On Mon, 25 Nov 2013, Gary J. Hayers wrote:

 >> I contacted Sophos and they were quite adamant that they don't help 
open source but get the feeling they thought it was Linux related and 
didn't realise that the ports tree caters for manually downloading 
distfiles
 >>
 >> Sent from my iPhone
 >>
 >>> On 25 Nov 2013, at 14:23, Philippe Audéoud <jadawin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:
 >>>
 >>> Ok, so, what can we do? Do we a solution to port this software? If not,
 >>> I guess we can close this ticket.
 >>>
 >>> Regards,
 >>>
